case_title: DIGIOVANNI, MARK VS CHENG, CHEUK LING ATMAN MPC COMPUTERS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,062.00 FILED BY DIGIOVANNI, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, CHEUK LING ATMAN MPC COMPUTERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, CHEUK LING ATMAN MPC COMPUTERS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIGIOVANNI, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHENG, CHEUK LING ATMAN MPC COMPUTERS $912.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $958.00, PLFT TO RETURN COMPUTER TO DEFT. WITHIN 14 DAYS OF THE DATE THE JUDGMENT WAS MAILED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
